No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit evidence related to poverty eradication, economic resources for the poor, or social protection systems.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or objectives that relates to ending hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course does not address health outcomes, disease prevention, mental health, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides 'speaking and writing training at the university level' (Target 4.3) and aims to develop 'professional communication skills' (Target 4.4) essential for employment.
evidence: speaking and writing training at the university level
C. 溝通能力(Students will acquire professional communication skills.)

Gender Equality.reason: The syllabus does not contain any specific content or objectives related to gender equality, discrimination, or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: There is no mention of water, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management in the course materials.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not relate to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops 'professional communication skills' (Core Competency C) which are crucial for 'productive employment and decent work' (Target 8.5) in the business context.
evidence: Business Writing and Oral Training I

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The syllabus lacks any connection to infrastructure development, industrialization, or technological innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course does not address income inequality, social inclusion based on status, or discriminatory practices.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: There is no evidence linking the course to urban planning, housing, transport, or cultural heritage.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course does not cover sustainable consumption, waste reduction, or responsible resource management.

Climate Action.reason: The course content does not include topics related to climate change, its impacts, or mitigation/adaptation strategies.

Life Below Water.reason: There is no evidence in the syllabus concerning marine ecosystems, ocean pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The course does not address terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course does not cover topics related to peace, justice, rule of law, or institutional effectiveness.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop 'team spirit' and 'work effectively in teams' (Core Competency E), which are foundational skills for effective partnerships (Target 17.17).
evidence: work... in groups to develop team spirit
E. 團隊合作與領導能力(Students will be able to work effectively in teams as well as develop leadership skills.)
